parsed_review.summary: CP00-701 (RP23.P02.M07.S03-S12, risk A, 10 units, micro "Test And Golden Case Set") is a descriptor-only finance-integrations Test And Golden Case Set pack. Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level claim is supported: manifest declares production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, pending exactly one hardened review (this one), with adjudication, construction-inspection, and command-evidence all consistently pending_review and no overclaim of runtime or enterprise trust. Coverage matches across registry binding/requirements, manifest snapshot, baseline, prompt, README, and live plan/queue (deliverable_distribution implementation:6/security_audit:2/ui:2; 10 section rows tenant/matter/permission/audit prechecks, happy/secondary paths, state/idempotency/lock, persistence boundary; next CP00-702 / RP23.P02.M07.S13). No-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundaries hold: every case-set row is descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, with no financial payload, credential, or raw payload, backed by a comprehensive no-write attestation; bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART, permission, audit, persistence, and Hermes runtimes remain closed. Authority boundary correct: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, Claude packet read_only=true and non-promoting; Hermes packets emit no runtime receipt (deterministic control-plane review/evidence only, not product runtime). Regenerated external-integrations-ii-contract.json sets current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-701, latest_projection descriptor FinanceIntegrationsCp701P02TestGoldenCaseDescriptor, preserves CP694-700 as historical, and reports top-level validation.valid=true, with model.test.js asserting these invariants. A 922KB scan of the generated contract found zero credential/secret/financial-leak patterns. Review hardening satisfied: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON), prompt 2394B within limit, no full diff/source embedded, tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, full source inspection performed (summary-only correctly prohibited due to security_audit deliverables), and no prior raw-output/receipt exists. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; PASS. blocks_goal_closeout=false as the expected human/enterprise-trust approval authority lies outside this receipt and the pack makes no runtime/enterprise-trust claim.
